description:
💼 Get Frankie's Full Agency OS 👉 https://beyondtheagencybox.com/book-offer-9536?am_id=keaton2983

📅 Frankie's YouTube 👉 https://www.youtube.com/@beyondagencyprofits  

🚀 30-Day Free Trial of HighLevel + $8324 in Bonuses 👉 https://www.gohighlevel.com/keaton-walker?fp_ref=vmuk5&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=conversations&utm_content=vid_frankie

📧 Join my Newsletter 👉 https://go.itskeaton.com/dd
📚 Browse my Courses + Templates + Bonuses 👉 http://go.itskeaton.com/courses

⚠️ IMPORTANT ⚠️ : Don't use an ad blocker or Chrome extension when clicking on the link, it will block affiliate tracking and you will NOT receive any of my bonuses

If you’ve already signed up and not received bonuses to your email, follow these steps: 
1) Check your Spam Folder 
2) If it isn’t there, follow these steps: https://go.itskeaton.com/ghltroubleshoot

Frankie breaks down the exact system he’s used to sell to over a thousand agency clients without doing sales calls for years. No calendars. No discovery calls. No endless follow-ups. Just simple “hand-raiser” posts and short videos that close for you.

We talk about why one-to-one outreach is crowded and backwards, how to flip the power dynamic so prospects feel like they found you, and how to validate offers in real time before wasting weeks building funnels or websites nobody wants. Frankie walks through how he frames offers around outcomes instead of services, why demonstrating the result matters more than explaining the tech, and how to contextualize price so it stops being the objection.

The most important part: the five-minute video framework that replaces sales calls entirely. What goes in the video, when to personalize vs reuse the same one, how to show price without killing conversions, and why buyers actually prefer being sold this way. If you’re tired of calls, time-wasters, and convincing broke prospects, this episode is pure gold.

Watch this if you want a simpler, faster way to sell services, SaaS, or offers without living on Zoom.

00:00-The Power of your Network    
01:08-Frankie's Script    
2:15-800 Clients without talking    
04:52-5-Minute Video

🚀 30-Day Free Trial of HighLevel + $8324 in Bonuses 👉 https://www.gohighlevel.com/keaton-walker?fp_ref=vmuk5&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=conversations&utm_content=vid_frankie
